name: Engineering Flow Radar — n8n Proof of Work (Demo)

nodes.name: Calculate Flow Metrics
nodes.notes: Computes throughput, median/P95 cycle time, PR review time, blockers, and aging WIP.

parameters.jsCode:
// n8n Code node: Run Once for All Items
// Generates fictional Jira/Linear + GitHub-style engineering flow data.

nodes.name: Generate Sample Engineering Data
nodes.notes: Sample input only. For live use, connect Jira/Linear/GitHub data sources here.

nodes.name: Generate Engineering Leadership Summary
nodes.notes: Creates Markdown and Slack-ready report text.

parameters.content:
1. Demo version uses sample data.
2. Live version can connect GitHub + Jira / Linear inputs.
3. Metrics mirror the operating system I use as Head of Engineering: throughput, cycle time, P95, blockers, review delay.
